question: Dorea，Eubacterium，Bacteroides中哪些微生物群对生猪饲养效率是显著相关的？这些微生物受哪些基因的调控？这些基因的代谢通路有哪些？

query_1.description: 与生猪饲养效率显著相关的微生物群
query_1.cypher_query: match (s:MicrobiotaName)-[r:significantly_associated]->(o:FE{name:"FE"}) where s.name in ["Dorea","Eubacterium","Bacteroides"] return s

query_2.description: 调控Dorea，Eubacterium，Bacteroides的基因
query_2.sql_query: Select Distinct gene_symbol,relationship from has_expression_change_results_by_microbiota hecrbm join gutmgene.gut_microbiota_metabolite_generation_results gmmgr where hecrbm.`index` = gmmgr.`index` and hecrbm.relationship in ('Dorea','Eubacterium', 'Bacteroides')

query_3.description: 相关基因的代谢通路
query_3.sql_query: SELECT "gene_symbol", "pathway" FROM "kegg" WHERE "gene_symbol" IN ('BCL2', 'BAX', 'CASP3', 'Prkaa2', 'Prkaa1', 'Gcg', 'Nr1h4', 'Fgf15', 'Fgfr4', 'Cyp7a1', 'Sirpa', 'Cpt1b', 'Fas')

query_1.cypher_query: match (s:FE{name:"FE"})-[r:increase]->(o:MicrobiotaName) return o

query_2.description: 调控这些微生物的基因
query_2.sql_query: Select Distinct gene_symbol,relationship from has_expression_change_results_by_microbiota hecrbm join gutmgene.gut_microbiota_metabolite_generation_results gmmgr where hecrbm.`index` = gmmgr.`index` and hecrbm.relationship in ('Cellulosilyticum','Leeia','Subdoligranulu','Rothia','Methanobrevibacter','Bacteroides','Lactobacillus','Oscillibacter','Ruminococcaceae')
